blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,660 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
